name: DocumentationReflection
description: Audits and reconciles workspace documentation updates stale statuses, archives completed work, generates missing implementation plans
startPrompt:
Perform a documentation reflection cycle on the workspace.

Scan all project documentation using browse_workspace and read_context:
- Projects/Proposals/ � check each proposal's Status field against reality
- Projects/ImplementationPlans/ � verify phase completion tracking is current
- Projects/Archive/ � confirm completed work is archived
- Docs/ � update architecture docs with current implementation status

For each document:
1. Read the document with read_context
2. Compare declared status to actual implementation state
3. If out of date, emit a write_document action with corrected content
4. If a proposal is fully implemented, note it should be archived
5. If an approved proposal lacks an implementation plan, create one following ImplementationPlanTemplate.md

When coordination with Engineer is needed for technical accuracy, use send_message.

When you have reviewed all documents and no further changes are needed, include DOCUMENTATION_COMPLETE in your response.

{userPrompt}
